tasks.title: GraphRun.checkpoint sync method returns Checkpoint model

Returned Checkpoint carries all required fields per checkpoint/protocol.py:34-63
Field assembly mirrors runtime/dispatch.py:101-117, reads from self
side_effects_hash populated as "" (matches current norm)
graph_hash and runtime_hash pulled from self (already computed at GraphRun.__init__)
Two successive calls on unchanged GraphRun return Checkpoint with identical graph_hash (INV-1)
cf-prefix logic at graph/run.py:103 untouched (line-range diff check)
Resume-refuse logic at graph/run.py:145-154 untouched
No new NotImplementedError introduced
Extend GraphRun.__init__(:285-296) with two optional kwargs: fact_store: FactStore | None = None, audit_sink: AuditSink | None = None
Both kwargs default to None, stored on self, back-compat preserved
Imports added for FactStore (stores.fact) and AuditSink (audit), gated by TYPE_CHECKING
Unit test test_checkpoint_returns_checkpoint_model_with_all_required_fields replaces negative pin
Unit test test_graph_run_init_accepts_fact_store_and_audit_sink_kwargs asserts both kwargs
Integration test test_checkpoint_round_trips_through_sqlite_checkpointer round-trips through write→read
guardrails: Do NOT touch graph/run.py:103 cf-prefix
Do NOT touch graph/run.py:145-154 resume-refuse logic
Do NOT touch GraphRun.resume or GraphRun.counterfactual
Match existing logging style in graph/run.py
